title: Steam Golem triples attack damage to AL twelve target

card.rawText: This creature is unaffected by creature effects and magic cards. This creature inflicts 3x Atk damage to any creature with an AL of 12. This includes equip cards.

plan.title: Steam Golem triples attack damage to AL twelve target
plan.summary: Verify Steam Golem attack damage is multiplied by 3 when the target has effective AL 12.

notes: Use an AL 12 defender to satisfy Steam Golem's target condition.

steps: Set Steam Golem as player_1 primary and AL 12 test defender as player_2 primary.
manualVerification: Confirm targets below AL 12 do not receive the multiplier, and equip-card AL increases count toward the AL 12 condition.
riskNotes: This fixture covers a natural AL 12 target; equip-adjusted AL 12 should get a separate fixture.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Steam Golem's AL 12 target damage multiplier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
